headline: A Look At Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Palantir’s recent performance and what it might mean for investors Palantir Technologies (PLTR) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch in the stock, with a 1 day gain of 3.6% but negative returns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Palantir Technologies. That 3.6% 1 day share price gain to around $144 comes after a weaker stretch, with a 30 day share price return of roughly 3% and a year to date share price decline of about 14%.
